reviews.comment:
Buenas ubicación. Podés opciones de desayunos y también comida. Un buen lugar para tomarse un descanso después de un buen tramos de ruta destruida.

(Translated by Google)
Good location. They have breakfast and lunch options. A good place to take a break after a long stretch of rough road.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMThLcnh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención. Estuvimos una hora y pico para cargar nafta! Sin ganas de atender rápido a la gente que tiene un largo viaje por delante. No recomiendo parar aca! El Full tambien atencion pesima.

(Translated by Google)
The service was a disaster. We waited over an hour to fill up with gas! They had no desire to serve people quickly, especially those with long journeys ahead. I don't recommend stopping here! The Full station also had terrible service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtNl9qMFRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay colas en temporada, conviene parar 20km más adelante en la ypf de Catriel que ni hay nadie

(Translated by Google)
There are always queues during the season, it is advisable to stop 20km further on at the YPF in Catriel where there is no one there.
